text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Wow, really?! So you finally made your debut,
then, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yep! Just a small step on my path to the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, even I've heard of that! It's like a totally
crazy, amazing race, right?

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
It still doesn't feel real, ya know? Tracen
Academy is where all those celebrities on TV
graduated from, right?

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
I know what ya mean! It's super crazy that Ines
goes to such an elite school! Totally insane!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you two! Ines is on her break, but you're
meant to be throwing out the trash. How long can
it take?!

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Ah crap, it's the manager!
Hey, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's up?

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
We're cheering for ya! Don't really know the deal,
but no doubt you'll crush it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, gotcha. Thanks for the support!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One Saturday, Ines Fujin arranges to have a
scrimmage with a fellow Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: One... two! Phew! One... two!
choice_data_list: Um... Sorry to keep you waiting.
Um... Sorry to keep you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, not at all! I should probably be the one
apologizing for getting here so early!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I just love to move my body, y'know! And that
includes doing warm-ups!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume with the radiant smile standing
before me is Mejiro Ryan, Ines Fujin's roommate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, Ines is at her part-time job, right? I saw
her spring out of bed and head out early this
morning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She always works right up until practice starts.
Says that it's so she can help support her family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
After having seen the way she perseveres from up
close, I can't help but be amazed by her mettle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Compared to her, I'm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With these hands, I shall deliver the shield to the
Mejiro family! This I promise you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! McQueen is just as gallant and
sophisticated as ever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...There are still so many areas where I lack
experience! I hope to learn as much as I can from
you today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume of the Mejiro family, I'm
expected to perform well in the Classics, after all!
Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is a rising star from an esteemed
family. Having this opportunity to scrimmage with
her is in and of itself a big win.
choice_data_list: Let's make the most of today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Right! Our time may be limited, but I'll pour
everything my muscles can muster into this
session!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait! It's one o'clock on the dot!
Cutting it close, but I made it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Ines! I hope work went well! I'm all ready and
raring to go!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Ryan! Let me just get a quick warm-up in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the scrimmage between the two begins...

text_block_list.name: Ines & Ryan
text_block_list.text: Great running today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That was awesome, Ines! Your stamina is on a
whole different level than before!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And your positioning on the the track was
flawless! You've improved so much compared to
six months ago—it's like you're a different person!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but you still overtook me right at the end, Ryan. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Argh! I'll definitely win next time! Count on it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I like your moxie. But I won't make it easy for you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: And I'm gonna triumph in the Derby, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh...
The Derby?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I saw the news on TV during a shift a little while
ago. You're gonna compete for the Classic Triple
Crown, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
They were saying you're a rising star with the
support of the whole Mejiro family behind you,
and that you're expected to claim supremacy in
the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin's gaze is fixed directly on her roommate
as she continues.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But the thing is, I absolutely won't allow myself to
lose. Not even against someone as incredible as
you, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: thinking

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's not that far away. We've got less than a
year to go, you know?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'll need to be a lot stronger by then—I'm no
match for you and the other racers right now,
after all.
choice_data_list: But before that comes the Asahi Hai F.S.
But before that comes the Asahi Hai F.S.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Right! Competing in that race will help me build
the experience I need!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha... And that's why you're taking on a G1
race? You got some real guts.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, our time here is limited, so I have to do
everything I possibly can. Otherwise, it'll all be
over before I've even realized it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
As a matter of fact, Ines, I was planning on going
to watch this year's Asahi Hai F.S.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! Then that's all the more reason to give
it my all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yeah, do your best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... You're really something else. Constantly
charging ahead without a shred of fear...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wonder what I'll be thinking when I watch you race.
